_source: Video C:/Users/in2ge/Videos/2026-07-22 17-42-03.mp4, build-screen pan at the end (Demon Lord Hard run). Read from frames by Claude 2026-07-22.
_note: 'Total Stats' = base + gear (green). These are the CHAMPION-level effective stats and do NOT include in-battle account bonuses (Arena / Great Hall / Faction Guardians), which add on top. A champion's build is the same across all content, so these are reusable for any battle the champ appears in.
_caveats: Ezio's base HP/ATK read DIFFERENTLY on two frames (116: HP 11,175 / ATK 1,012; 085: HP 12,346 / ATK 888) — the build-screen totals fluctuated between frames. Treat Ezio's numbers as approximate until a stable reading is captured.

Ezio, Pelops, Kael came from the Demon-Lord video build pan; Bambus and Tagoar were supplied directly by Mike as build screenshots 2026-07-22. Builds are champion-level (same across content) so Ezio/Pelops/Bambus/Tagoar are reusable for the Dragon-16 team — only VERGIS remains uncaptured.

champions.name: Ezio Auditore
champions.flag: base HP/ATK unstable across frames — see _caveats

champions.name: Pelops the Victor
champions.flag: LIFESTEAL GEAR — the app assumes NO champion has Lifesteal/Regen/Immortal; Pelops's sustain partly comes from this and is currently discarded by the model.

champions.name: Kael

champions.name: Bambus Fourleaf
gear_sets: (sets not confirmed; HP-heavy: +10,746 HP from gear)
champions.flag: Top damage dealer on Dragon (~506k) despite ATK 819 — his damage is POISON/DoT (%maxHP), currently no coeff in our data. On the Dragon-16 team.

champions.name: Tagoar

champions.name: Vergis
champions.flag: DEF-SCALING: A1 Pierce = 3.9 x DEF. His DEF is 1,249 but the sim reads his multiplier as ATK (661), under-counting the ONE champ dealing direct damage on Dragon. Completes the Dragon-16 team.
